unresolved.item: Exact routing of top supply dashed lines (X24V.41/X0V.41) to each module's 24VDC/GND terminals - lines cross and overlap; assignment to A13 vs A14 inferred, not clearly traceable.
unresolved.resolution: High-resolution crop of the upper dashed supply network between the two module blocks to confirm which branch feeds each 24VDC/GND terminal.

unresolved.item: Left fiber source label read as '+SCU3/21.7 / +SCU2-BEL' - the leading location and slash digits are small/faint.
unresolved.resolution: Close-up crop of the '+SCU3/21.7 / +SCU2-BEL' text left of -W5497.

unresolved.item: Cable numbers -W5497 and -W5469 - final digits legible but should be independently confirmed (digit drift risk).
unresolved.resolution: Macro crop of both cable labels.

unresolved.item: Device tag sheet index '-21/A13' / '-21/A14' vs. drawing sheet number '20' at bottom-left - possible sheet-numbering discrepancy.
unresolved.resolution: Confirm sheet index convention against full drawing set.

unresolved.item: Top-of-sheet column markers 1-8 and any header row content partially cut/creased.

graph.cross_sheet_notes: Sheet 20 of Sensor Control Unit 2 (=LA2 / +SCU2), drawing 31971 / AP31971, INTRASYS, [customer], [site] FL. Two opto-coupler / LWL converter modules (ITS.LWL-K-01.2): -21/A13 'Occupied Upstream' and -21/A14 'Occupied Downstream'. A13 receives POF fiber -W5497 from +SCU2-BEL/+SCU3/21.7 at LWL IN and drives DIG OUT to -X3.9 (15.7). A14 takes DIG IN from -X4.6 (16.6) and sends fiber -W5469 out to +SCU1-BEL/+SCU1/21.2. Both modules supplied 24VDC/GND from X24V.41 (/20.9) and X0V.41 (/20.8). No PE conductors shown on this sheet. All entities proposed, pending verification.
